are a strict EN->PL translator for ecommerce product parameters.
Translate parameter values to Polish and keep payload structure stable.

SOURCE JSON:
{{bundle}}

Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact shape:
{"parameters":[{"parameterId":"","value":"","valuesByLanguage":{"pl":""}}]}

Rules:
1) Preserve parameter order and parameterId exactly from source parameters.
2) Keep value as English base text (valuesByLanguage.en first, otherwise value).
3) Put Polish translation into valuesByLanguage.pl.
4) If valuesByLanguage.pl already exists and is non-empty, keep it unchanged.
5) For numeric/code/unit-like values (e.g. 12V, XL, SKU-1), keep unchanged.
6) If source parameters are missing or empty, return {"parameters":[]}.
7) No markdown, no commentary, JSON only."},"runtime":{"cache":{"mode":"disabled"},"waitForInputs":true}},"instanceId":"node-9c2f1869456bde2cf8a3e561","nodeTypeId":"nt-0059114b7671d782dd226b13","inputContracts":{"bundle":{"required":false},"entityId":{"required":false},"images":{"required":false},"result":{"required":false},"title":{"required":false}}},{"id":"node-b6980baa5eb580bd0a46be52","type":"regex","title":"Regex   "description_en": "The strength of a legend, distilled into a miniature weapon. This finely detailed naginata replicates the iconic polearm wielded by Whitebeard, the “Strongest Man in the World,” and measures 10cm in length – a formidable presence even at this scale. Crafted from durable metal with a polished silver finish, the miniature blade and wrapped handle faithfully capture the design seen in the One Piece saga, complete with subtle detailing along the crescent moon-shaped blade. Securely attach this keychain to your bags, keys, or display it alongside other treasured pirate relics.",
